transcript.clean_text: considering the layout of stage 12 today the better should be rough to catch the right escape group because the track just seems made for breakaways 80 kilometers of even ground before it gets to the Puerta de Leon a first category ascent followed by the slightly less demanding part of the tork up but before having to face a total relief of 2,300 meters it takes some time for an escape route to succeed eventually 14 men break away amongst em hosokawa king rojas pavel polyansky oma friday and judy and evil with good teamwork the escape group has a lead of seven minutes at mid race the first ascent is passed easily but on the descent of the puerta de Leon Julian Duval crashes and has to watch his fellow escapees pull off the leading group stays focused and that the final ascent the breakaways have a lead of nine minutes to the peclet by team sky the big showdown will take place on the ascent of the puerto de tour cow thomas march in ski attacks and the leading group falls apart after a second effort the polish gets rid of rojas and friday to attempt the solitary run over the last 21 kilometers already successful at Sagunto last week the former polish champion passes the summit with the lead of one minute and then rides a flawless descent to antiquorum they couldn't take a stage on this year's Tour de France the team lotta so Dahl makes up for this with the second stage win on the Vuelta 2017 the beginning of the stage was rather laid back for the peloton but this changes 20 kilometers from arrival Alberto Contador attacks leaves his rivals behind and joins his teammate it returns an escape group his gamble pays off as Christopher Froome crashes on the descent the leader of team trek Sega Fredo continues to hunt on his final Grand Tour and takes 40 seconds of the race leader today there is no resting on this well town no stage to recharge the batteries Christopher Frome learned this the hard way today first detect by Alberto Contador and the final ascent the British had tend to deal with a mechanical problem and after changing bikes he even crashed a few hundred meters further the leader of the world has seemed very nervous today and all he could do was to give it all not to lose too much time Contador eventually takes 40 seconds of the race leader froome's other rivals come closer by 20 seconds the world 2017 is far from being decided incredible is my dream from when I was kid when one one stage on Victor alone and today the dream become true Thomas Marcin ski success was overshadowed by the battle in the group of favorites but the Polish enjoys his second stage win today he passed the line more than 1 minute ahead of the locals Friday and Rojas in the overall ranking 'nobody now lies less than a minute behind Chris Froome followed by six riders who are distanced by less than three minutes Contador continues to make up time but still lies over three minutes behind the race leader after riding along the seashore for the bigger part of Thursday the pack goes inland to dive into the streets of Sevilla the stage made for the sprinters before two upcoming mountain stages
